scope: Centralize Team Builder rules-derived limits and squad requirements into shared helpers without changing public behavior, model outputs, optimizer scoring, candidate ordering, or the generated Team Builder artifact.

rule_sources.browser_before: budgetLimitForMatchday() computed budget.initial_budget + budget.knockout_increase for finalRound
rule_sources.source_detail: Official rules data provides 100 initial budget plus 5 knockout increase; the active artifact also records constraintsUsed.initial_budget 105.
Official rules data and active artifact both expose final cap 8.

rule_sources.browser_before: positionRequirementsFromRules() converted rules.squad.positions to display-label keys
rule_sources.browser_after: getTeamBuilderPositionRules(rulesConfig) returns code and browser-label maps

rule_sources.browser_before: formationToRequirements() parsed allowed formation strings locally in script.js
validated by shared captain/vice constraint helper and browser decision tools; no standalone rules config existed
rule_sources.browser_after: getTeamBuilderCaptainRules(rulesConfig) documents the shared validator contract
rule_sources.source_classification: official rules data plus current validator contract

rule_sources.browser_before: browser state sets plus constraint helpers
rule_sources.source_classification: current browser state and manual FIFA live-state caveat

kept_as_golden_assertions: selected squad player names and ids

explicit_answers.browser_budget_source: Shared getTeamBuilderRulesConfig, using current Final Round implementation-backed value 105 from official rules formula and active artifact constraints.
explicit_answers.browser_country_cap_source: Shared getTeamBuilderRulesConfig, using current Final Round value 8 from official knockout final limit and active artifact constraints.
explicit_answers.browser_formation_position_source: Shared rules helpers derive allowed formations and display/code position maps from fantasyRules.json, with active artifact confirmation for Final Round 4-3-3 starter requirements.
explicit_answers.browser_squad_size_source: Shared getTeamBuilderSquadSizeRules reads the normalized rules config.
explicit_answers.browser_captain_vice_source: Shared getTeamBuilderCaptainRules documents the same captain/vice validator contract already enforced by constraint helpers.
explicit_answers.duplicated_rule_values_remaining: Golden assertions intentionally freeze expected values; optimizer scoring and ranking remain separate.
explicit_answers.risky_hardcoded_values: No newly risky public rule constants were introduced. Golden values remain hardcoded only as regression assertions.

final_recommendation: Proceed with scoped refactor commit if all QA gates pass.
